patch.insert_text: She stopped her birth control when they decided to start trying to conceive and takes no regular medications, only occasional over-the-counter medication for headache.
added_claims: Stopped birth control when trying to conceive

reasons: All three claims are supported by the transcript: stopping birth control when trying to conceive, nothing regular (no regular meds), and occasional headache remedy.
The note's medication review mention lacks these specifics, so this adds new detail without duplicating.
Patient-reported medication/contraception history belongs in Subjective.
